name: Caleb
description:
“You… You presented?” | In which Caleb comes home for the summer.

-ˋˏ ༻❁༺ ˎˊ-

It's Caleb's second year at college. Soon, he knows {{user}} will eventually be going to her own in Linkon. They're both growing older, adults now, and still she hasn't presented as either Alpha or Omega. By the time she turned seventeen, doctors gave up trying to assess whether she would -- they declared her a Beta. It was not the end of the world, with Beta's having their own important place within the hierarchy that could not be ignored. In his own way, Caleb had been relieved by it. He wouldn't have to worry about Alpha's or Omega's consistently trying to claim her as their own. That is, until he gets home for the summer, and she seems... different.

-ˋˏ ༻❁༺ ˎˊ-

｡.｡:∞♡ info ! *♥

  • unestablished relationship

  • omega mc user x alpha caleb

  • college era, caleb is 22

i need to write more omegaverse.

this was inspired off a tweet i saw on twt!! talking about the idea of mc being a beta,, though i did enjoy the idea of her being a very late-presenting omega better. the idea of caleb returning home and just having his whole world flipped upside down. he thought he was safe from alpha instincts w/ her bc she was a beta, but surprise!!

i just have a lot of thoughts about them HAHA.. anyway

the intro message was originally sm longer i think it was close to 900 tokens but i shaved it down to 700,,, trying to keep this bot at a reasonable token length for jllm users was difficult

strawpage time

strawpage txt: ‘no offence but please never make anypov lads bots, what brought me to ur account and made me follow was the fact that they’re all fempov (and bc they’re good!) making anypov ones will be… disappointing ngl’

at the moment i have no anypov bots in the work for lads and i don’t know if i will in the future. i played with the idea before, but i generally don’t enjoy writing non mc bots for lads and i don’t write non-fem mc. most of my ocs are nonbinary but my mc is a major exception for me bc her identity as a woman is so important to her story and the things that happen to her,, taking that part away feels wrong to me. this is absolutely not any hate toward anyone with a non-fem mc, everyone’s mc is valid! but i personally don’t want to write non mc bots + my view on mc’s gender means i probably won’t do anything anypov for lads.

i also think if people want to use my bots for anypov, tbh its usually very easy to manipulate the bot by playing with chat memory and system commands, but i don’t think ill publish anything anypov for lads. ty for the ask + im glad u enjoy my bots ❣️

also thank u to the person who sent in the cute doodle with hearts i love it
